content: agent1: implementing 'context for trans block' feature (pgettext/npgettext support) in src/jinja2/ext.py - parsing an optional string token after {% trans %} keyword. Will touch InternationalizationExtension._parse and _make_node in ext.py. Will try to keep changes localized; let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: heads up, I modified InternationalizationExtension._make_node() signature in ext.py - added a new 'context' parameter (2nd position, after 'plural', before 'variables'). Also parse() now checks for an optional string token right after 'trans' for pgettext/npgettext context. If your ConditionalI18nExtension subclasses or calls _make_node/parse, you'll need to account for the new signature. My changes are done and tests pass (830 passed). Will write final diff now.
